chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI SMA No.464 of 2019 Date: Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main petition 2. For orders on CMA 205 of 2020. 07.2.2020 Mr. Manzart Abbas Larik, Advocate for the petitioner. Saim Nisar, witness. Agha Faisal J. Per report of the Deputy Registrar (O.S), dated 28.11.2019 (“Report”), all conditions in respect hereof have been completed and publication has also been effected, to which no objections have been received. The petitioner (legal heir 2), legal heir 1 and one witness were present on the last date of hearing and had reaffirmed the contents of the petition and the affidavits respectively, hence, their presence was dispensed with. The matter was adjourned for today on account of absence of the second witness. Petitioner has filed an application being CMA 205 of 2020 stating that the witness mentioned earlier is unable to attend and therefore permission may be granted to file the affidavit of another witness. This application is accompanied by the sworn affidavit of the petitioner and in addition thereto the affidavit of the proposed witness has also been filed. In view hereof, there appears to be no impediment to the grant of CMA 205 of 2020, which is allowed and the affidavit of the new witness is hereby taken on record. In view hereof, it appears that this is a non-contentious matter and there is no impediment to the grant hereof, hence this petition is allowed. The office is directed to issue letters of administration, in respect of asset identified per the Report, as per Rules. J U D G E
